rationale: Proposal stage. Proposer helios:proposer:gov-drafting-team submits policy revision v1.0.0 for committee review. Proposal subjectArea (helios:subj:registry-governance), severityTier (recommended), and jurisdiction (helios:jurisdiction:registry-internal) are within the proposer's declared scope per helios:profile:proposer-scope:v1. Proposer attaches criterion-attestation evidence demonstrating that the proposal claims to satisfy helios:criterion:scope-validity:v1 and helios:criterion:severity-justification:v1. Awaiting reviewer evidence.
